channel.title: Frontier Paper Radar
channel.description: Automated AI paper collection, scoring, tiered selection, bilingual briefs, and transparent source logs.

item.title: Agents and Tool Use, Benchmarks and Evaluation, and other signals to track
item.description: This issue selects 5 featured papers from 18 candidates. Main signals: Self Evolving Agents for Tool Use Skills；RAG Evaluation under Noisy Retrieval；Efficient Long Context Inference with Cache Compression.
